---
title: "Networks of coupled dynamics — hands on"
subtitle: "Session 2b · Defining a FAIR brain network model"
jupyter: python3
---

## Goals

- TODO: load a connectome
- TODO: assemble a network simulation with delays and coupling
- TODO: explore the global coupling parameter

## Setup

```{python}
# TODO: imports
```

## Load the connectome

```{python}
# TODO: load weights, tract lengths, region labels
```

## Run a network simulation

```{python}
# TODO: configure simulator, integrate, collect outputs
```

## Sweep global coupling

```{python}
# TODO: loop over coupling values, summarise activity
```

## Exercises

- TODO: identify the coupling regime that maximises FC correlation
- TODO: swap in a different parcellation
